[COMPARISON BETWEEN GAUSSIAN AND MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODELS IS DONE. GAUSSIAN MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE WITH ACCURACY OF 98.5% AND F1 SCORE OF 0.98. MULTINOMIAL MODEL SHOWS LOWER PERFORMANCE WITH ACCURACY OF 95.2% AND F1 SCORE OF 0.95. CURRENT MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE THAN CURRENT MULTINOMIAL MODEL.]
